title: bridge-jmap: full-mailbox scan on every poll is O(n) in mailbox size
description: email_query always does a full Email/query scan (jmap.rs:259-308) sorted by receivedAt descending. With a large mailbox (thousands of emails), this paginates through every email ID on every poll. The JMAP spec provides Email/queryChanges for incremental polling. since_state is accepted but unused. For a 30s poll interval and 10k emails: 200 HTTP requests per poll. O(n) per poll where n is mailbox size.
